svg.text: Y-junction: collisionGuard fuses sensor + commanded-velocity inputs to satisfy safety reqs.
safetyPort is the architectural channel that admits EmergencyTrigger events.
The robot shall halt all motion within 0.5 s
of receiving an emergency stop command.
The robot shall maintain a minimum clearance
of 0.3 m from all detected obstacles.
Parametric decomposition: maxResponseMs in EmergencyStopReq frames totalResponseMs.
